navbar.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 transition-colors duration-300
navbar.logo_notes: Dark navy logo needs to be placed directly on the deep blue background so it blends seamlessly. Use the provided logo URL.

hero.overlay: Use the abstract network image as an absolute background with opacity-20 and mix-blend-luminosity.
hero.layout: Centered text or asymmetrical text on left, abstract graphics on right.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00A6A6] text-white hover:bg-[#008080] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white text-white hover:bg-white/10 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-[#0F4C81] text-[#0F4C81] hover:bg-[#0F4C81] hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-colors

cards.base: bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-gray-200/50 hover:-translate-y-1
cards.icon_wrapper: w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-[#0F4C81]/5 flex items-center justify-center text-[#0F4C81] mb-6

hero.title: Technology. Talent. Transformation.
hero.subtitle: Empowering your business with cutting-edge IT Services, Talent Acquisition, RaaS, and IaaS.

why_choose_us.layout: Split layout. Left: Grid of 4 feature blocks. Right: Large animated stat counters.

industries.layout: Grid cols-2 md:cols-3 gap-6. Minimalist icon-based cards. Use Lucide icons.

process.layout: Horizontal timeline. Use a flex-row setup with connector lines hidden on mobile.

testimonials.style: Elegant cards with subtle border and avatar.

cta_banner.layout: bg-[#0F4C81] py-20 text-center rounded-3xl mx-6 my-24 overflow-hidden relative

footer.contact: talent.experts@elephasolutions.com | +919486602103 | Srikaram Shelters, Plot No 62, Ramalingapuram, Kelambakkam, Tamil Nadu 603103

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Poppins and Open Sans via Google Fonts in index.html.
Implement the sticky navbar: transparent at the top, becoming solid deep blue (#0F4C81) upon scroll. Place the dark navy logo inside it as the user specified it will blend.
For the hero section, layer the hero_background image with opacity-20 and mix-blend-luminosity over the solid deep blue background. Ensure text is highly readable.
For the Services, Industries, and Testimonials sections, strictly use the provided grid layouts with generous spacing (py-24 or py-32).
Use framer-motion for the statistical counters in the 'Why Choose Elepha' section so they animate on scroll.

Use Lucide icons for the Industries We Serve section (e.g., Monitor/Code for IT, Landmark/Dollar for Banking, HeartPulse for Healthcare, Factory for Manufacturing, ShoppingBag for Retail, Rocket for Startups).
Contact form must have a basic functional POST method. Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
